attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.HEADER_ID,
CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.CMS_SOURCE_CODE,
CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.CMS_SOURCE_HEADER_ID,
CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.ALIGN_FLAG,
CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.PROJECT_CODE,
CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.CUSTOMER_SERVICE_REP,
CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.CSR_TEAM,
CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.ATTRIBUTE31,
CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.ATTRIBUTE33,
CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.ATTRIBUTE35,
CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.ATTRIBUTE36,
CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.ATTRIBUTE37,
CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.BILL_TO_DEPT,
CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.CREATION_DATE,
CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.CREATED_BY,
trim(CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.CUST_PO_DATE),
CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.CTMP_QUOTE_NUMBER,
CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.EXPIRATION_DATE,
CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.INVOICE_PRINT_FORMAT,
CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN,
CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.DPAS_NUMBER,
CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.PROJECT_ID,
CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.PERIODIC_BILLING_FLAG,
CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.PRIME_DEAL_FLAG,
CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.TAXABILITY,
CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.ORDER_ORIGIN,
CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME,
'CG' GLOBAL_NAME,
CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.RETURN_BY_DATE,
CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.CISCO_BOOK_DATE,
CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.AUTO_CANCEL_DATE,
CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.FOUNDATION_FLAG,
CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.FAX_RECEIVED_DATE,
CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.ORDER_SUBMITTED_BY,
CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.SVO_RMA_NUMBER,
CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER,
CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.CISCO_BOOK_RESULT_CODE, /*Added as part of Q4FY14 OM LSS*/  
CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.CBN_IDENTIFIER, /* Added as part of Sales_orders changes for August QWN032,2014*/
CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.CUSTOMER_ACCEPTANCE_DATE /*Added as part of CPE Enhancement for Q2 FY2015*/
,TRANSLATE(ORDER_NAME USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) ORDER_NAME /*Added as part of CPE Enhancement for Q3 FY2015*/
,COALESCE(CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.SUMMARY_QUOTE_FLAG,'N')  /* Added SQF and SQT as part of  RTnR FY18 AprilRel */
,COALESCE(CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.SUMMARY_QUOTE_TYPE,'UNKNOWN')  /* Added SQF and SQT as part of  RTnR FY18 AprilRel */
/* Added as part of SFP Rel */
,CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.SOURCE_PROFILE_ID
,CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.DISTI_SO_NUMBER
,CASE WHEN CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.SOLD_FOR_PRICE_FLAG = 'NA' OR CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.SOLD_FOR_PRICE_FLAG IS NULL THEN '=' ELSE CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.SOLD_FOR_PRICE_FLAG END AS SOLD_FOR_PRICE_FLAG   
,COALESCE(CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.SPECIAL_SERVICE_QUOTE_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') AS SERVICE_ORDER_TYPE_CD
,CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.SHIP_TO_CONTACT_EMAIL_POINT_ID
,CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.SHIP_TO_CONTACT_PHONE_POINT_ID
,CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.SHIP_TO_CONTACT_FAX_POINT_ID
,CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.END_CUSTOMER_CONTACT_EMAIL_POINT_ID
,CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.END_CUSTOMER_CONTACT_PHONE_POINT_ID
,CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.END_CUSTOMER_CONTACT_FAX_POINT_ID
,CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.BILLING_CONTACT_EMAIL_POINT_ID
,CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.BILLING_CONTACT_PHONE_POINT_ID
,CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.BILLING_CONTACT_FAX_POINT_ID
,CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.INSTALL_CONTACT_EMAIL_POINT_ID
,CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.INSTALL_CONTACT_PHONE_POINT_ID
,CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.INSTALL_CONTACT_FAX_POINT_ID
,CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.INSTALL_SITE_CONTACT_ID /* added 15 columns as a part of Fy24 dec rel */
,CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.COMPLIANCE_PROGRAM_TYPE
,CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.COMPLIANCE_PROGRAM_WAIVER
,CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.MARKETPLACE_PROVIDER
,CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.MARKETPLACE_PROGRAM
,CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.SHORT_TERM_RENEWAL
,CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.REQUESTED_BY
FROM 
$$NRTACCUMVWDB.CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E
WHERE
CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= '$$LastExtractDate' AND CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME < '$$EndLastExtractDate' 
AND
CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.SOURCE_DML_TYPE <> 'DELETE'
AND COALESCE(ORDER_ORIGIN,'UNK') <> 'CCW-EA3-MERAKI'
/*AND CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.CMS_SOURCE_CODE IS NULL */ /*To handle converted order as part of CE AUS*/
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.HEADER_ID ORDER BY CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDRS_E.REFRESH_DATETIME DESC) = 1
